testcase.name: test_deleted_msg_not_in_conversation

failure.message: AssertionError: Deleted message still appears: ['share me', 'broadcast attach', 'to delete', 'DELME_715ec6'] assert 'DELME_715ec6' not in ['share me', 'broadcast attach', 'to delete', 'DELME_715ec6']

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_messaging_new.py:152: in test_deleted_msg_not_in_conversation assert marker not in contents, f"Deleted message still appears: {contents}" E AssertionError: Deleted message still appears: ['share me', 'broadcast attach', 'to delete', 'DELME_715ec6'] E assert 'DELME_715ec6' not in ['share me', 'broadcast attach', 'to delete', 'DELME_715ec6']

testcase.name: test_unread_count_excludes_deleted

failure.message: AssertionError: Unread count includes deleted msg: before=5 after=6 assert 6 <= 5

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_messaging_new.py:177: in test_unread_count_excludes_deleted assert after <= before, f"Unread count includes deleted msg: before={before} after={after}" E AssertionError: Unread count includes deleted msg: before=5 after=6 E assert 6 <= 5

testcase.name: test_search_thread_filter

failure.message: AssertionError: Thread search should filter — got non-matching content: ['share me', 'broadcast attach', 'to delete', 'DELME_715ec6', 'LASTDEL_4f127b', 'unread-del', 'bc_6db4e0', 'selfsilent', 'hi', 'NEEDLE_3a017d', 'other content'] assert False + where False = all(<generator object TestSearch.test_search_thread_filter.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0x786165f218c0>)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_messaging_new.py:252: in test_search_thread_filter assert all(marker in c for c in contents), \ E AssertionError: Thread search should filter — got non-matching content: ['share me', 'broadcast attach', 'to delete', 'DELME_715ec6', 'LASTDEL_4f127b', 'unread-del', 'bc_6db4e0', 'selfsilent', 'hi', 'NEEDLE_3a017d', 'other content'] E assert False E + where False = all(<generator object TestSearch.test_search_thread_filter.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0x786165f218c0>)
